User-agent: *
Allow: /
# Public read-only API endpoints needed for JavaScript rendering
Allow: /api/games/stats
Allow: /api/gamepix-catalog
Allow: /api/onlinegames-catalog
Allow: /api/game-requests
Allow: /api/previews/manifest
Allow: /api/auth/user
# Block raw API JSON pages from being indexed and protect sensitive routes
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin/

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Disallow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Disallow: /
